subTitle: Anirudh begins to feel restless when he recollects Bondita's words. Meanwhile, Bondita decides to leave Anirudh to take responsibilities off his shoulders.

subTitle: Mr Porter's van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore, and Katie and her cat are on a stranded chair lift, leaving them with no way down.
